items.front: Under 2-10-1, what is the en route facility term for 'D-Side' or 'Manual Controller'?
Under 2-10-1, what is the core principle of the en route team concept?
items.back: No absolute divisions of responsibilities. The team as a whole is responsible for the safe and efficient operation of the sector, regardless of staffing count.

items.front: Under 2-10-2, what is the terminal formal term for 'Handoff Controller' or 'Radar Data Controller'?
Under 2-10-3, list four common names for the Tower Associate Position.
